title: alternanthera dolichocephala
intro: Alternanthera dolichocephala, also known as 'Dwarf Copper Leaf', is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Alternanthera dolichocephala is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
